'''âk-z-n-w''' ('''kakaznewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:babyproof|babyproof]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-z-n-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:babyproof|babyproof]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-z-n-w
|-
! Lemma
| kakaznewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikaznewoko|thikaznewoko]] || [[word:jikaznewoko|jikaznewoko]] || [[word:shikaznewoko|shikaznewoko]] || [[word:kikaznewoko|kikaznewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
